generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted on the motor for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MABIMAX100FirstAxisSensorData
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder located behind the gearbox for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MABIMAX100FirstAxisSensorData
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring motor phase currents for the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MABIMAX100FirstAxisSensorData
]

instance MABIMAX100FirstAxisSensorData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, MotorCurrentSensor
    base:desc "Real-time sensor data stream (position and current) transmitted via MQTT for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured position data from motor encoder for first axis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MABIMAX100FirstAxisSensorData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance SecondaryPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured position data from secondary encoder behind gearbox for first axis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MABIMAX100FirstAxisSensorData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured current data from motor phase sensors for first axis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MABIMAX100FirstAxisSensorData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque data calculated from motor current measurements and motor parameters"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MABIMAX100FirstAxisSensorData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity data calculated from position measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MABIMAX100FirstAxisSensorData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance SysMLBlockDefinitionDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural modeling of MABI MAX 100 first axis components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingTool
]

instance SysMLInternalBlockDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural modeling of MABI MAX 100 first axis components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingTool
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model used in Simulink simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model used in Simulink simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model used in Simulink simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model used in Simulink simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance StructuralModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Structural model insights derived from SysML Block Definition and Internal Block Diagrams"
]

instance StructuralModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for creating structural models using SysML"
    DTDFVocab:provides StructuralModelInsight
]

instance FrictionLossDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionLossInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Adjustment of robot control algorithms for enhanced motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyImprovementAction
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization of robot status and friction detection results"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance AssetManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Management of digital twin assets via Asset Administration Shell"
    DTDFVocab:provides AssetManagementInsight
]

instance DataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time streaming of sensor data via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStreamingInsight
]

instance FrictionLossInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of friction loss in robot joints for improved control"
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjustment of robot control algorithms to enhance motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of robot joint positions and friction detection results"
]

instance DataStreamingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Confirmation of real-time sensor data streaming via MQTT"
]

instance AssetManagementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Management of digital twin assets via Asset Administration Shell"
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearwheel component in the first axis drive system"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox in the first axis drive system"
]

instance MABIMAX100FirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Environment for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox, MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance SysMLModelingTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tool for structural modeling of the robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelingService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for simulation of friction models and motion control"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionLossDetectionService, MotionAccuracyImprovementService
]

instance MQTTStreaming : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStreamingService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for digital twin asset management"
    DTDFVocab:enables AssetManagementService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for real-time monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data processing for live measurements during robot operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of physical robot components, digital shadow with engineering models, simulation models, data traces, processing components, and dashboard for unified visualization."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As-operated phase, using live operational data for friction analysis."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Comparison of simulated data versus measured reference data to validate friction models; white-box and black-box models used for accuracy improvement."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming from sensors to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell (AAS) and SysML standards for modeling and data exchange."
]
